3035.name: Inside the Stalagmite
3035.description: The inside of the stalagmite is much larger than you would have thought possible by viewing it from the outside. The walls are painted a bright red. A stairway twists up to the second floor, and a stone archway leads north into a work area.

3038.name: Workshop
3038.description: You see lots of glassware and bubbling vats. The vats are all filled with a whitish, viscous liquid that gives off a horrible, pungent reek. On a low table lie several man-like forms composed of wooden sticks strung together with twine. A doorway leads back south.

npcs.name: Cloanthus
npcs.description: Self-styled Archmage of the Underworld, Cloanthus appears in black robes embroidered with little evil runes.  He wields a skull-topped staff, and dead animals dangle from his belt.  But you've seen it all before. How droll.

2581.name: Bottom of the Stair
2581.description: More of the tiny globes pepper the walls of the landing at the bottom of the wide stone stair. Their placement, however, is much more erratic, and several have been smashed out. Pools of stagnant water gather in recesses on the smooth floor, spawning all manner of creeping slime. Gnawed remains of fish and rats litter the area, attracting flies. You have lost 702 experience.

u.to_room_name: At the Top of the Staircase

npcs.name: Emaciated ghoul
npcs.description: A pair of glowing irises stare at you from deep in the shadows.  What little flesh remains to the creature is rotting away.  Its movements are quick and

2582.name: Moldering Hall
2582.description: Rich tapestries once lined this low hallway, but have reached such a state of decay that they are now little more than a continuous carpet of mold, broken only by an archway on the northern wall. Debris, mostly destroyed furniture, but also pieces of several corpses - human and otherwise - are mixed among the detritus. A ghoul wight strikes at you in vain. You jump to the side and press your attack home! (23) The ocean's energy begins to flow through you, granting you the speed of a gentle current.

npcs.name: Ghoul wight
npcs.description: Both eyes are missing, and the flesh from one leg has been chewed away, possibly by his brethren.  A swarm of rats and flies follow in his wake.

npcs.name: Pale ghoul
npcs.description: Small and thin, with webbed hands and feet, the horrible little creature hisses with a watery gurgle, then lunges for your neck.

2583.name: Flooded Apartment
2583.description: A sewer main running above the ceiling of this room has worn through the stone, and now leaks steadily into this abandoned study. The water damaged remains of a bed, and probably a dresser - or cabinet - are all that is left of the furnishings, the rest plundered or smashed to rubble long ago. Dark mushrooms cluster in the shadows, their caps dusted with pale spores.

npcs.name: Pale ghoul
npcs.description: Small and thin, with webbed hands and feet, the horrible little creature hisses with a watery gurgle, then lunges for your neck.

npcs.name: Snaggle-toothed ghoul
npcs.description: Nasty little beastie, isn't he?  He's pale and covered in sewer filth, and gurgles like a plugged drain as you interrupt his meal - half a rotted

3036.name: On the Staircase
3036.description: The stairway climbs around a pole. After the first couple rotations, your view of the ground floor disappears and you can see the floor of the upper level. The wall adjoining the staircase is painted with garish whorls. You think it's supposed to have some deeper significance, but you aren't finding one.

3039.name: Treasure Room
3039.description: Mirrors line all four walls and the ceiling overhead, multiplying the gold and riches you see tenfold. Considering that half the items on the floor are mere baubles, you are not impressed.

1680.name: Small Tunnel
1680.description: The tunnel weaves back and forth so you are forced to constantly double back on your steps, going east and west for every step north and south you take. You think you hear voices in the distance, but you cannot be sure.

npcs.name: Thief
npcs.description: He's dressed in dark colors, and you wouldn't notice him in this light unless you were really looking for him.

1674.name: Well Bottom
1674.description: The well bottom is dry and littered with junk. Small animal skeletons crunch under your feet, and rats squeak angrily from the darkness. A tunnel has been cut into the well wall, leading north. Light from the surface shines faintly down, a small circle way overhead.

1675.name: Small Tunnel
1675.description: The tunnel is rough hewn and filled with more garbage. A hole in the southern wall leads out to a small room. The tunnel continues eastward, meandering from side to side. Your feet strike against a skeleton, half buried in the debris.

npcs.name: Ardast
npcs.description: Lank and greasy hair frames a face full of suspicion.  Ardast is a shifty- eyed man in rumpled and stained clothing.  Ill luck seems to hang over him

1676.name: Small Tunnel
1676.description: Bits of wood, broken crockery, and rotting burlap litter the ground. Here and there you can see some animal bones, mostly mouse and rat. The tunnel extends to the west and east, barely high enough for you to stand.

1677.name: Rocky Tunnel
1677.description: The floor was hewn from the same rock as the rest of the tunnel, but the passage of many feet has worn down its rougher edges. You are at the center of a T junction, one tunnel leading north, another east, and a smaller one going west.

1678.name: Round Chamber
1678.description: Tunnels lead off in four directions from this point: north, south, east, and west. The ceiling lifts away from the surrounding walls to form a small dome, and the room itself is about thirty feet across. Painted overhead is a crude representation of the heavens, day and night circling each other in endless dance. Samu goes south. You follow Samu south. Rocky Tunnel The floor was hewn from the same rock as the rest of the tunnel, but the passage of many feet has worn down its rougher edges. You are at the center of a T junction, one tunnel leading north, another east, and a smaller one going west.

1679.name: Small Tunnel
1679.description: The ceiling hangs very low here, forcing you to stoop as you travel through the passageway. The tunnel twists and winds, but eventually leads north and south. You cannot see before or behind you for very far. n

2576.name: Rocky Tunnel
2576.description: The passageway makes an elbow here, one half going north and the other east. To the west you see a dark landing built from polished stones and lit by tiny colored globes.

w.to_room_name: At the Top of the Staircase

npcs.name: Thief
npcs.description: He's dressed in dark colors, and you wouldn't notice him in this light unless you were really looking for him.

1681.name: Large Cavern
1681.description: A large chamber has been carved out of the cliff rock. Columns of stone left in place form pillars, four on either side. Torches affixed to these cast the room in a flickering light. Gold statues around the perimeter gleam occasionally, almost ready to come to life. Doorways lead off to the west, south, and east. You have lost 756 experience.

npcs.name: Darvas
npcs.description: Darvas is an older, somewhat pretentious man wrapped in black silk. He strokes his long moustache and tries to look official as he glares

npcs.name: Gold statue
npcs.description: It looks like a little gold man with small horns on his forehead.

1682.name: Council Chamber
1682.description: A large, circular table sits in the center of the room, cluttered with maps and papers. Around it sit eight places, each with a small silver ink pot and quill feather pen. Built into the center, a small rounded coffer rises up about a foot or so. Lighting the room are round globes which have been fastened to the walls at regular intervals. Beneath all this the floor is covered with a plush carpet.

npcs.name: Ankhartas
npcs.description: Swarthy and angular, Ankhartas sits by the head of the table and is very smug about this fact.  You wonder how many he has stepped on to get there.

npcs.name: Faliah
npcs.description: She has her arms crossed against her chest.  She regards Ankhartas with cool dislike and Radnor with open disdain.  Every time he eyes the coffer,

npcs.name: Radnor
npcs.description: Easily the weakest member of the council, Radnor relies solely on his total lack of morals and shame.  He stepped over his mother to get here.

2577.name: Rocky Tunnel
2577.description: The tunnel is uneven, its walls sloping at odd angles and its ceiling dipping and rising erratically. You find yourself in a corner with one tunnel leading south and the other west.

2580.name: At the Top of the Staircase
2580.description: A dark balustrade carved from the rock overlooks a flight of stairs curving gracefully down into the depths. The chamber is lit by hundreds of tiny globes set into the rock in wild, flowing patterns. Two braziers at either side of the top step burn purple from an unseen fuel source. A tunnel to the east leads away from the light.

npcs.name: Slime golem
npcs.description: It's about six feet tall and constructed from slime.  You wonder

2578.name: Rocky Tunnel
2578.description: The air is stifling, and every breath you take seems to rasp loudly down the tunnel. The walls are smoothed here, and you see a curious drawing to the east. Passageways lead away from you to the north, west and south.

2579.name: Rocky Tunnel
2579.description: You find yourself at a T junction with tunnels leading north, east and south. From the eastern tunnel, you can see a strange glow. The earth seems to weigh down upon you, and you catch yourself unconsciously stooping.

npcs.name: Slime golem
npcs.description: It's about six feet tall and constructed from slime.  You wonder

2584.name: Rocky Tunnel
2584.description: Your footsteps send crazy echoes down through the stone corridors. At times, you hear the chittering of rats, or the scrape of a foot against stone. The tunnel turns, heading south and east.

2585.name: Rocky Tunnel
2585.description: The tunnel makes a bend here, heading north and west. The rock is rough and cold to the touch. It juts out at unexpected places, as if a simple passage through was deemed good enough.

2586.name: Rocky Tunnel
2586.description: The tunnel widens and narrows in a haphazard fashion, sometimes large enough for two people, sometimes barely large enough for one. The way twists and winds, heading vaguely north and east.

npcs.name: Slime golem
npcs.description: It's about six feet tall and constructed from slime.  You wonder

2587.name: Rocky Tunnel
2587.description: A large iron lever stands out from a rough corner. It looks quite old, but you can't detect any rust. The tunnel continues to the west and south.

2588.name: Rough Tunnel
2588.description: The tunnel opens up to a chamber to the east and continues southward. The chilly air makes your skin clammy. You can detect a faintly unpleasant odor emanating from the south, though you think you hear voices to the east. Tall stalks of hemlock rise from damp ground, white flowers deceptively delicate.

2589.name: Rough Tunnel
2589.description: The tunnel snakes its way through the rock, heading roughly north and south. The walls slant toward each other, forming a crude triangle. You can hear rats moving around in the darkness about you.

2592.name: Messy Lair
2592.description: The musky odor is almost overpowering. You see a roughly circular chamber, covered in dung and scattered with bits of gnawed bone. In the center is a bed of mouldering cloth. You wonder how many people died to contribute their clothing to that disgusting pile.

npcs.name: Giant rat
npcs.description: Its head is about the same size as your head. Its teeth are as long as your fingers.

2593.name: Arched Passageway
2593.description: The tunnel is carved to resemble an arched passageway. A blue carpet follows the stone corridor as it extends to the north and west. In the corner where the two sides meet you see a white marble pedestal holding a large crystal ball.

npcs.name: Guardian spirit
npcs.description: It towers above you, looking translucent and quite magical.

2590.name: Rough Tunnel
2590.description: You can definitely hear squeaking here. Something scurries from your approach and scolds you from a distance. The tunnels form a T here, going north, east, and south. A strong musky odor flows from the southern tunnel.

2591.name: Rough Tunnel
2591.description: Garbage lies strewn around the area. Bits of cloth, scraps of metal, and gnawed bones festoon the tunnel floor in dubious splendor. You kick against a loose rock, only to recognize it as a human skull. The tunnel leads to the north and east. A stale, musky odor wafts from the east.

npcs.name: Large rat
npcs.description: Hm.  Black, furry body.  Long, naked tail.  Pointed nose.  Beady eyes. Sharp teeth.  Sharp claws.  Yup, it's a rat, but boy, is it BIG!

2595.name: Rough Tunnel
2595.description: The walls seem to close in on you more readily within this passage. The tunnel is somewhat triangular, narrowing considerably at the top just above your head. You can walk either north or south.

2596.name: Rough Tunnel
2596.description: Your footsteps seem to echo dangerously loud as you trip over the uneven floor. Sometimes your feet crunch against tiny animal bones, and the sound makes your bones feel brittle as well. The tunnel turns here heading north and west.

2597.name: Rough Tunnel
2597.description: From somewhere, you can hear the chittering and squeaking of rats, but you're not sure from which direction it comes. The air is rank and sour--very pungent. The tunnel continues west and east. You see a small crack to the south, but it's much too narrow to fit through.

2601.name: Circular Cavern
2601.description: You see a large, round chamber carved from the rock. The walls are polished to a sheen, and little patches of fungi dot the floor in an abstract pattern. In the exact center rises a column of black stone. Carved to look like a stalagmite, it succeeds only in looking stupidly artificial. A tunnel leads west from the cave.

npcs.name: Slime golem
npcs.description: It's about six feet tall and constructed from slime.  You wonder

2602.name: Rocky Tunnel
2602.description: Passages lead west and south, and a narrow staircase leads around and up through the stone. Wandering these tunnels, you wonder if worms have ever felt that the earth might suddenly close in and crush them.

2603.name: Stairway
2603.description: The stairway twists around in a tight spiral. Somewhere on the other side of the rock wall you can hear roaring water. At the top you find a door outlined in the stone.

2604.name: Dark Waterfall
2604.description: Two streams meet here as the floor makes a sudden plunge down to the next level. A narrow ledge leads east and west across the gushing waters. The walls are mossy with slime, and a terrible stink wafts up from below. An old ladder next to the waterfall allows you to descend.

npcs.name: Black rat
npcs.description: Hm.  Black, furry body.  Long, naked tail.  Pointed nose.  Beady eyes. Sharp teeth.  Sharp claws.  Yup, it's a rat, all right.

npcs.name: Scavenger
npcs.description: He carries a bag filled with items he has fished out of the water.

2605.name: Under Eternity
2605.description: A set of iron spikes driven into the wall serves as a makeshift ladder up to a large grate set in the street above. Sewer water filled with bits of garbage flows from the east and south to the west, where you can hear a dull roaring.

2606.name: City Sewers
2606.description: Light shines down from the occasional grate, illuminating a stream of polluted water and dripping, algae-covered walls. The shadows cast by the grates remind you of bars and prisons. Not a nice association. The sewer tunnel runs east and west.

2607.name: City Sewers
2607.description: Water flows by you from the west to the south, sometimes gushing and sometimes almost without a ripple, depending on the width of the trough at your feet. The stones are slick with moisture, and an organic funk permeates the air.

2608.name: City Sewers
2608.description: The air smells of stale feces and old rain water. The stones of the walls are covered with a thick carpet of slippery algae, but at one point seem scraped clean. The sewer trough runs north and west.

2609.name: City Sewers
2609.description: The sewers are filled with a constant gurgle as rain water mixed with sewage flows ever southward. Bits of debris float on top of the surface, and the smell is very organic. The tunnel makes a bend to the west, its stones covered with slimy and stringy algae.

2610.name: City Sewers
2610.description: Two streams of oily water meet to flow southward, one from the north and the other from the west. A narrow ledge on either side of the water allows you to remain relatively dry, but it will still take a day to air the greasy stink out of your clothes.

2611.name: City Sewers
2611.description: Water mixed with sewage and small bits of garbage flows from the north toward a large intersection to the west. Looking closely, you can see scummy white patches, bits of wood, and was that a hand that just floated by?

w.to_room_name: The Quadruple Junction Under the Dump

2612.name: The Quadruple Junction Under the Dump
2612.description: Three streams of dark and noxious water meet at this junction and flow to the north. Upon slimy stones glow a few choice epitaphs, painted onto the walls with a foul, mashed fungus paste. A ladder bolted to one of the walls leads up through a layer of garbage, and a ledge to each side allows you to traverse the tunnels without wading.

2613.name: City Sewers
2613.description: A stream of polluted water runs inside a wide stone trough through a tunnel system beneath the city. The oily water flows from the south to join with other tunnels at a large junction directly to the north. You feel a slight breeze coming from a small side tunnel to the west.

npcs.name: Half-decayed corpse
npcs.description: female.  What remains of the skin is a bloated, larval white, and maggots wriggle in and out of its exposed muscles.

npcs.name: Scavenger
npcs.description: He carries a bag filled with items he has fished out of the water.

2614.name: City Sewers
2614.description: Dark water mixed with sewage and debris flows from the west to the north with a sullen burble. Large coagulations of scum float past you occasionally, looking almost ready to evolve into a rudimentary life form.

2615.name: Cramped Passageway
2615.description: The passageway angles sharply up from here and narrows to the east, where you can hear the flow of water. A damp unwholesome odor flows from that direction as well, making you unconsciously wince. Rubble is piled around a low doorway in the southern wall of the tunnel.

3037.name: Cloanthus`s Chamber
3037.description: You see a large room furnished with heavy, baroque furniture. In the center is a glass aquarium housing two tentacled fish. Chains and hooks dangle from one corner. The bed is covered with animal pelts, the dresser with a dusty collection of human skulls. You find this room a very good example of its type.
